title.en: Research on the Data Scope, Architecture, and Underlying Storage Design of CMDB
title.zh: CMDB（Configuration Management Database）的数据范围、架构与底层存储设计研究

summary.en: A systematic study of CMDB data scope, configuration items, relationship modeling, current snapshots, historical change events, data sources, data quality, layered architecture, PostgreSQL-centered source-of-truth storage, event streams, caches, search indexes, and graph relationship projections for read-heavy and write-heavy cloud-native environments.
summary.zh: 系统研究 CMDB 的数据范围、配置项、关系建模、当前快照、历史变更事件、数据来源、数据质量、分层架构，以及面向读多写多云原生环境的 PostgreSQL 核心事实源、事件流、缓存、搜索索引与图关系投影设计。

readingDirection.en: Read this when designing a CMDB, modeling configuration items and service relationships, choosing the underlying storage for a configuration management platform, or separating stable master data from high-frequency instance changes in cloud-native environments.
readingDirection.zh: 适合在设计 CMDB、建模配置项与服务关系、选择配置管理平台底层存储，或在云原生环境中拆分稳定主数据与高频实例变更数据时阅读。
